use_cases: Drag-and-drop file upload for web applications requiring document or media submission
Creative portfolio sites needing visually engaging file input interactions
E-commerce platforms for product image or document uploads
SaaS dashboards for user content submission workflows
Media sites for multimedia file ingestion with animated visual feedback
ai_summary: An animated fish-themed file drop zone component featuring swimming fish, wave effects, and bubble animations. Supports full drag-and-drop file selection with customizable colors, dimensions, and typography. Built with Framer Motion for smooth animations and React hooks for state management. Ideal for creative platforms or any application needing an engaging, playful file input experience.
